text:
Comment on attachment 171113
Proposed patch (since 416324 revision)

lightside, thanks for the patch. I confirm this builds in a 10.3 amd64 poudriere jail. I'm just not sure about those timetamp modifications in patches, as if the patch is not against the HEAD?

Anyway, implicit approval, as the port has no maintainer.
